Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 21
STR: +2 DEX: -10 INT: +2 AGI: -10
HP Regen +15
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST BER
Race: ALL except VAH
Slot 1, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 21
STR: +2 DEX: -10 INT: +2 AGI: -10

Tint:
 
Color (RGB):200, 200, 225

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark

Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55

cake
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2013 at 6:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1662941909065
4 posts
AE with 71wiz & cleric merc....used Jyll's Static Pulse to stun, preventing healing and it casts pretty fast. I used Jyll's Wave of Heat inbetween. This method works for everything in this zone

mmk
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2009 at 4:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1609114782783
View User Forum
Scholar
746 posts
If you're talking about killing the spore king, you probably could with a mercenary. The only thing is you'd need to kill every myconid around the area, as they can heal through walls iirc.

Fungi
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2008 at 6:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343702472
5 posts
First time I camped him, got the fungi two times after 2 kills, tried camping him agian (Twice) for about 5 hours, got nothing, Think its just luck of the draw...:)
▲ Page top
Fungi Tunic Drop Rate
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2008 at 9:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594572308762
11 posts
I camped his spawn point.
Out of 67 spawns, only 16 were Kings.
The first 15 kings dropped the robe.
The 16th King - 67th spawn, dropped the tunic.
▲ Page top
Fungi Tunic Drop Rate
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2008 at 5:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594572308762
11 posts
I camped him again. Out of 11 spawns, 3 were kings. The first 2 kings dropped the robe. The 3rd king dropped the fungi tunic. Still haven't seen a staff drop yet.

The spawns were in this order (R=Reaver, K=King)
RKRRKRRRRRK
▲ Page top
pretty darn rare tunic
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2007 at 2:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591828020915
882 posts
I have camped this guy alot and never seen the tunic drop.Once camped him 12 hours a day for 3 days straight and nothing but robes and 1 fungi staff.Its just luck i guess.I did get 2 cobalt bracers though.Sold each for 50k.
▲ Page top
Fungus Tunic
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2005 at 9:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593365911274
7 posts
So far today I have had 14 spawns. 4 of those being the King. 3 robes (/destroy) and 1 Fungus covered great staff. I'm not leaving til I get my Tunic! Boxing a 70 beastlord with 10k self buffed with P10. Along with him I'm boxing my Druid. Only been using snares because this guy is a newb!
▲ Page top
PH
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2005 at 10:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262076926
Scholar
77 posts
The PH for the king is only a Reaver. From all the time I've been camping him, it's been a Reaver everytime...Finally got one after 7.5 hours of camping ~.~
▲ Page top
Location
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2005 at 7:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258988162
304 posts
-920, 115, -165 <Location of Myconid Spore Kings Castle> PH: Reaver, Warrior. Him or his PH are ontop of the Castle with 2 trash mobs. Happy hunting, running and Jumping can get u up at the side with an opening in the ramparts. Man the Castle walls, for otherwise the Castle Falls !!!
▲ Page top
bah cant be worn by kitties
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2005 at 8:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591810553938
1 post
the fact that the only race that cant use this is vah shir is kinda lame, just a side note
▲ Page top
RE: bah cant be worn by kitties
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2005 at 10:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778631293
Scholar
330 posts
Kitties get another version called the Fungus Patch Vest. It has the same stats but is required level 51. It's also rarer since the camp is a far more painful and annoying ring event.

The story I heard was this was done deiberately to prevent rapid powerlevelling when Luclin came out.

Since the new frogs were put on the fungi why can't they put kitty on it too?
▲ Page top
RE: bah cant be worn by kitties
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2005 at 11:00 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592260262682
285 posts
zerkers cant use either. so if ur a zerker kitty dont get one.
▲ Page top
80k-90k on Povar
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2005 at 11:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784883611
19 posts
Povar server:
Bought it yesterday for 80k in Bazaar.
Today 3 people had it in /trader for 90k each.

I think it was definately worth getting, easy to get the 80k back also if I intend to sell it ever!

I really, really, really love it!
▲ Page top
for shammy's
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2004 at 5:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592260262682
285 posts
this item is great for a shaman. Although once you get to the higher levels it doesnt seem as good as before. Once you get Replinishment or Cani 5 fungi has little to no use and should be sold or given to alt cauz u can cast one quiesence on ur self and u go back to full hp
